Home insurance

Check your price

Product highlights

Protect your home contents, renovations and personal possessions against fire, theft and accidental damage.

Includes home assistance services when urgent plumbing, electrical or lock issues happen.

  • Coverage for building, renovation and home contents.
  • Personal accident benefit for domestic helpers and household members.
